## Validation

- [ ] `uv run --extra dev python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `uv run --extra dev python -m build`
- [ ] `uv run --extra dev ruff check .`

## Safety

- [ ] Tool names remain stable, or breaking changes are explicitly documented.
- [ ] Browser flows remain screenshot-first.
- [ ] No runtime logs, local virtual environments, build output, or machine-specific paths are committed.
